title: arctium majus subsp. nemorosum
intro: Arctium majus subsp. nemorosum, also known as woodland burdock or greater burdock, is a biennial plant that belongs to the dandelion and thistle family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. The medicinal properties of Arctium majus subsp. nemorosum include its ability to reduce swelling, relieve pain, and boost the immune system, providing health benefits such as improved digestion, reduced fever, and accelerated wound healing. Arctium majus subsp. nemorosum can be prepared as teas, infusions, tinctures, or ointments, making it a versatile and accessible herbal remedy.
